title: Major school athletics meetings
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A major interschools...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A major interschools athletics competition is being held on Friday and Saturday, 2 and 3 February, at the Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A major interschools athletics competition is being held on Friday and Saturday, 2 and 3 February, at the Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All the primary schools in the greater Mossel Bay area are taking part.","html":"All the primary schools in the greater Mossel Bay area are taking part."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Large number of schools","html":"Large number of schools"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The competition is being held over two days because of the large number of schools involved.","html":"The competition is being held over two days because of the large number of schools involved."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The schools have been divided into sections A, comprising 10 schools, and B, comprising 12 schools.","html":"The schools have been divided into sections A, comprising 10 schools, and B, comprising 12 schools."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Friday the section B schools compete and on Saturday, the section A schools.","html":"On Friday the section B schools compete and on Saturday, the section A schools."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Regional athletics","html":"Regional athletics"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The teams chosen from each of the sections on Friday and Saturday will compete in the Mossel Bay regional athletics meeting on 17 February at the Van Riebeeck Stadium.","html":"The teams chosen from each of the sections on Friday and Saturday will compete in the Mossel Bay regional athletics meeting on 17 February at the Van Riebeeck Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Successful athletes from that meeting will then go to the Eden athletics competition for schools. Friday's and Saturday's meetings comprise the first round of the interschools athletics meetings.","html":"Successful athletes from that meeting will then go to the Eden athletics competition for schools. Friday's and Saturday's meetings comprise the first round of the interschools athletics meetings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hosts","html":"Hosts"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Friday's athletics meeting is being hosted by Ridgeview Primary School and the organiser is René Booysen, a staffer at Ridgeview, and Saturday's meeting is being organised by Lionel Kennedy of Erika Primary School.","html":"Friday's athletics meeting is being hosted by Ridgeview Primary School and the organiser is René Booysen, a staffer at Ridgeview, and Saturday's meeting is being organised by Lionel Kennedy of Erika Primary School."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Call René (061 218 4951) and Lionel (081 019 1771) for more information.","html":"Call René (061 218 4951) and Lionel (081 019 1771) for more information."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here are the programmes for Friday (section A) and Saturday (section B).","html":"Here are the programmes for Friday (section A) and Saturday (section B)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SECTION A ATHLETICS PROGRAMME.pdf","html":"SECTION A ATHLETICS PROGRAMME.pdf"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SECTION B ATHLETICS PROGRAMME.pdf","html":"SECTION B ATHLETICS PROGRAMME.pdf"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.’"}]
